rtv_threshold.description: Fraction of connected non-bot players that must RTV to start a vote.

rtv_min_players.description: Minimum connected non-bot players required before RTV can trigger.

rtv_map_count.description: Number of map options on the ballot (capped at 8; "Don't Change" takes the 9th slot).

rtv_cooldown.description: Distinct maps that must play before a map is RTV-eligible again.

rtv_initialdelay.description: Seconds after a map starts during which player RTV is refused (SM rtv_initialdelay; sm_forcertv bypasses it).

rtv_vote_duration.description: Seconds the RTV map vote stays open.

rtv_show_tally.description: Show the live center-screen tally during the RTV vote.
